steps.text: Crack the eggs into a big bowl.
steps.displayText: Crack the eggs into a big bowl.
steps.completedText: Crack the eggs into a big bowl.

steps.text: Stir the flour and milk together.
steps.displayText: Stir the flour and milk together.
steps.completedText: Stir the flour and milk together.

steps.text: Wipe down the countertop before serving.
steps.displayText: Wipe down the countertop before serving.
steps.completedText: Wipe down the countertop before serving.

steps.text: Dice the tomatoes into small cubes.
steps.displayText: Dice the tomatoes into small cubes.
steps.completedText: Dice the tomatoes into small cubes.

steps.text: Mix the sauce with a big spoon.
steps.displayText: Mix the sauce with a big spoon.
steps.completedText: Mix the sauce with a big spoon.

steps.text: Rinse the vegetables under cold water.
steps.displayText: Rinse the vegetables under cold water.
steps.completedText: Rinse the vegetables under cold water.

steps.text: Julienne the carrots into thin matchstick strips.
steps.displayText: Julienne the carrots into thin matchstick strips.
steps.completedText: Julienne the carrots into thin matchstick strips.

steps.text: Fold the egg mixture gently into the vegetables.
steps.displayText: Fold the egg mixture gently into the vegetables.
steps.completedText: Fold the egg mixture gently into the vegetables.

steps.text: Zest a lime over the finished dish for brightness.
steps.displayText: Zest a lime over the finished dish for brightness.
steps.completedText: Zest a lime over the finished dish for brightness.

steps.text: Scrub the cutting board clean between ingredients.
steps.displayText: Scrub the cutting board clean between ingredients.
steps.completedText: Scrub the cutting board clean between ingredients.

steps.text: Ladle the hot sauce into a serving bowl.
steps.displayText: Ladle the hot sauce into a serving bowl.
steps.completedText: Ladle the hot sauce into a serving bowl.

steps.text: _____ the onion until you have tiny, even pieces.
steps.displayText: _____ the onion until you have tiny, even pieces.
steps.completedText: Mince the onion until you have tiny, even pieces.

steps.text: _____ the pot slowly so nothing sticks to the bottom.
steps.displayText: _____ the pot slowly so nothing sticks to the bottom.
steps.completedText: Stir the pot slowly so nothing sticks to the bottom.

steps.text: _____ the peppercorns until they are a fine powder.
steps.displayText: _____ the peppercorns until they are a fine powder.
steps.completedText: Grind the peppercorns until they are a fine powder.

steps.text: _____ the celery stalks under running water before using them.
steps.displayText: _____ the celery stalks under running water before using them.
steps.completedText: Wash the celery stalks under running water before using them.

steps.text: _____ the potatoes into quarters before adding to the pot.
steps.displayText: _____ the potatoes into quarters before adding to the pot.
steps.completedText: Quarter the potatoes into quarters before adding to the pot.

steps.text: _____ everything together one final time before serving.
steps.displayText: _____ everything together one final time before serving.
